popup.title: Create a designed template using artificial intelligence
popup.placeholder: Describe the desired newsletter style (for example: "Summer sale - colorful and playful, 3 product blocks, large call-to-action button)"

tips.title: Details for better results:
tips.toneDesc: Specify the desired tone (bold, minimalist, elegant, fun, professional)
tips.elementsDesc: Specify colors or visual style you would like to incorporate
tips.specificDesc: Specify the topic (sale, event, season) and the purpose of the newsletter
tips.structureDesc: Detail the structure (headline, product grid, button, image, footer)
